notableEvents.label: Dalton Rushing pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dalton Rushing grounds out, second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call doubles (5) on a line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Alex Call to 3rd. Alex Call advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Adolis García.

notableEvents.label: Edmundo Sosa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edmundo Sosa homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field. Bryce Harper scores.
